chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.12 of 2017 M/s R.B. Avari Enterprises (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Director General Department of Plant Protection & another DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For hearing of CMA No.1595/2017. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1564/2017. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1565/2017. 4. For hearing of CMA No.313/2017. 5. For hearing of CMA No.314/2017. 6. For hearing of CMA No.51/2017. 7. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.01.2024 Mr. Usman A. Hadi, Advocate for the appellant. Ms. Afsheen Aman, Advocate for Respondent No.2..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Hadi, learned counsel appearing for the appellant does not press this appeal having become infructuous on account of the suit having lost its efficacy. The High Court Appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
